name: Planner renders gracefully with no subjects or sessions
description: Verify the weekly planner page does not crash or show a blank screen when the user has no subjects configured. Should show an empty state or guidance.

planSteps.description: Log in with the test credentials and navigate to /app/planner.
The planner page renders without crashing — a week grid or calendar view is visible.
The week navigation arrows (previous week and next week) are visible and clickable.
Click the next-week arrow to navigate forward one week.
The week label updates to show the next week's date range. No crash or blank screen.
